studies.title: Preparation of a clinical report on anonymized, statistically evaluated Data from a retrospective data collection on the clinical efficacy of the CE-marked Vivira app "Therapeutic exercise program for home use"

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the Vivira app, as evidenced by the title and detailed description in the full text, which mentions the CE-marked Vivira app and its use for therapeutic exercise at home.

_classification.reason: The study is a retrospective analysis of data collected from routine use of the Vivira app, focusing on clinical efficacy. It uses observational data without randomization, fitting the criteria for real-world evidence (RWE).

studies.title: Preparation of a clinical report 2020-2021 on anonymized, statistically analyzed data of a retrospective data collection on the clinical efficacy of the CE-marked Vivira app "Therapeutic Exercise Program for Home Use"

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the Vivira app, as evidenced by the title and full text which mention the CE-marked Vivira app 'Therapeutic Exercise Program for Home Use'. The study investigates the efficacy of this specific digital therapeutic product.

_classification.reason: The study is a retrospective analysis of data collected from patients using the Vivira app, which is observational in nature and does not involve randomization or a control group, fitting the criteria for real-world evidence (RWE).

studies.title: Post-marketing effectiveness of a digital therapeutic for unspecific and degenerative back, hip and knee pain during an extended probation period: An observational study of patient-reported outcome data

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about a digital therapeutic approved as a DiGA by BfArM, which matches the description of Vivira. Additionally, the contact information includes Vivira Health Lab GmbH, confirming the involvement of the manufacturer.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a retrospective observational study using patient-reported outcome data to assess the effectiveness of a digital therapeutic. It does not involve randomization or a control group, which are key features of an RCT, thus classifying it as RWE.
